confidence_rationale: Clear view of all transfers and placements. All 6 objects visible throughout task. No penalties observed with good camera angle coverage.
technique_summary: Solid intermediate performance with consistent technique and no penalties. Time of 112 seconds places this in the intermediate range (60-120s). All objects successfully transferred in both directions.
strengths: Smooth midair transfers with good bimanual coordination
Proper sequence execution in both directions
improvement_suggestions: Reduce overall time by 20-30 seconds to reach expert level
Increase speed of individual object placements
